response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong programming fundamentals with 16+ years of software engineering experience, this role requires specialized expertise that is absent from their background. They lack native Japanese language proficiency (a hard requirement), have no security or embedded networking experience, and their career has focused on web and fullstack development rather than embedded firmware. Their C experience (mentioned briefly from a 2014-2015 role) is outdated and secondary to their JavaScript/TypeScript specialization.
strengths: 16+ years of software development experience across diverse domains demonstrates strong problem-solving and adaptability
Proven ability to write testable, maintainable code with emphasis on TDD and software craftsmanship practices
Fluent English communication with technical publications and teaching experience
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency listed (hard requirement); resume shows only English, Romanian, and German
Career trajectory entirely in web and fullstack development with minimal recent embedded systems or security specialization
No demonstrated experience with network security, cryptography, authentication systems, or embedded device firmware

key_factors.factor: No security or embedded networking domain expertise
C programming not primary specialization; web/fullstack career focus instead
